description: Style Notefabindia's natural, craft-based pieces pay tribute to small business artisans in rural India. This earthy stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its Jaipur patterning. The print is handblocked - a painstaking process with almost 500 block repeats per metre! Twist this piece into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric on your skin. Product DetailsCream Chanderi stole with hand block print in tones of pink and wine and hemmed sidesMaterial and CareSilk cotton blendDry clean onlySizeApproximate length: 190 cmApproximate width: 55 cm
